query: Vélomediane Claudy Criquielion gran fondo cycling La Roche-en-Ardenne

videos.title: Vélomédiane Claudy Criquiélion 2017, 18% climb after 69 km. La roche en ardenne.
videos.description: Roche en Ardenne have the start of Claudy Criquiélion with many steep hill. This is the first hill doing the third leg of the race Claude Criquiélion.

videos.title: Vélomédiane Claudy Criquiélion 2017 first 5K (N89 La Roche En Ardenne - Beausaint)
videos.description: Video from the first climb of Claudy Criquiélion 2017. The climb starts in La Roche en Ardenne, and is 5K long. The road is bad as you can see, and it is about 3-5% steep.

videos.title: Vélomédiane Claudy Criquiélion 2017, La Roche en Ardenne
videos.description: From the race Vélomédiane Claudy Criquiélion starting in La Roche en Ardenne. This video is from 2017 incl speed and increase rates.

videos.title: Velomediane 2015 - La Roche
videos.description: Cyclo Velomediane in La Roche. Door Youri & Frank uit Nijmegen.
